case_title: OUTCO INC. VS. LI QUAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 210084044) TO PLAINTIFF OUTCO INC.
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-07-25 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-07-2025 HEARING RE: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF OUTCO INC.; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MOTION IS UNOPPOSED. MOTION IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER IN THE APPROPRIATE JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM. JUDGE: BARBARA A. ZUNIGA; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-07-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF OUTCO INC.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion is unopposed. Motion is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order in the appropriate judicial council form.

Judge: Barbara A. Zuniga; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/BAZ)
